message: Equal px-N and py-N Tailwind classes can be simplified to p-N. Use the shorthand utility to reduce class list noise.

Tailwind class 'space-x' or 'space-y' detected. Using space-x/y utilities on flex layouts can cause layout bugs (especially in RTL or with hidden children). Prefer using flexbox gap utilities ('gap-x', 'gap-y', or 'gap') instead.

Tailwind class 'space-x' or 'space-y' detected. Using space-x/y utilities on flex layouts can cause layout bugs (especially in RTL or with hidden children). Prefer using flexbox gap utilities ('gap-x', 'gap-y', or 'gap') instead.
Three ASCII periods '...' used as an ellipsis in JSX text content. Use the typographic ellipsis character '…' (U+2026) instead for correct spacing and screen-reader pronunciation.
Three ASCII periods '...' used as an ellipsis in JSX text content. Use the typographic ellipsis character '…' (U+2026) instead for correct spacing and screen-reader pronunciation.

Animating an SVG element directly with motion.svg causes browser repaint issues on many devices because SVG elements cannot be composited to their own GPU layer. Wrap the SVG in a motion.div (or motion.span) and animate the wrapper instead, keeping the SVG inside as a static child.

Animating an SVG element directly with motion.svg causes browser repaint issues on many devices because SVG elements cannot be composited to their own GPU layer. Wrap the SVG in a motion.div (or motion.span) and animate the wrapper instead, keeping the SVG inside as a static child.
